platform_badge_glow_desc: Adds a glow effect to the Steam/Xbox platform badge in the sidebar.
virtual_mod_mode_desc: Stage mods in a manager folder instead of copying into the game Data directory (beta).
config_editor_spellcheck_desc: Shows browser spell-check in the INI/JSON/TXT editor. When on, underline position stays aligned with the text; turn off to hide red underlines in code files.
confirm_before_delete_mod_desc: Show a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting a mod or config file from disk.
confirm_before_remove_old_mod_on_update: Confirm before removing old mod on update
confirm_before_remove_old_mod_on_update_: After a Nexus update installs, ask before deleting the previous version from your mod list.
delete_mod_confirm: Permanently delete "{0}"? This cannot be undone.
delete_all_mods_confirm: Permanently delete all {0} mods from the manager? This cannot be undone.
delete_all_configs_confirm: Permanently delete {0} config file(s)? Core game INI files are kept (Fallout76Custom/Prefs for Steam, Project76Custom/Prefs for Xbox). This cannot be undone.
edit_badge_color_none_mods: No mod types to customize. Add mods to the Mods tab first.
edit_badge_color_none_configs: No config types to customize. Add config files to the Configs tab first.
configs_backed_up: Config files backed up under Backups/Configs for this platform.
no_config_files_to_backup: No config files found to back up.
seven_zip_path_placeholder: Usually auto-detected. Override with 7z.exe if needed for .7z archives.
rar_tool_path_placeholder: Usually auto-detected if WinRAR or 7-Zip is installed. UnRAR.exe is the command-line extractor bundled with WinRAR. Override with WinRAR.exe, UnRAR.exe, Rar.exe, or 7z.exe if needed.
settings_paths_desc: Set game, documents, and mod paths. 7-Zip and WinRAR are usually found automatically for .7z / .rar import.
settings_advanced_desc: Backup INI files, reset config, or clear cache.
theme_open_folder_hint: Open the folder where .f76theme files are stored
theme_import_success: Theme "{0}" installed. Select it in the list above.
theme_reload_hint: Rescan the Themes folder for .f76theme files
theme_reload_success: Loaded {0} theme(s) from the Themes folder.
theme_reload_failed: No themes could be loaded from the Themes folder.
theme_reload_empty: No .f76theme files found in the Themes folder.
hero_desc: Appalachia is waiting. Your configuration is optimal.
launch_game_with_mods: Launch the game with current mods
update_load_order: Update load order and BA2 files
nexus_tip_desc: Sign in with Nexus Mods in Settings for one-click downloads.
nexus_connected_desc: Your Nexus account is connected. Credentials are stored locally on this computer only.
nexus_login_desc: Sign in with your Nexus account to search and download mods in-app.
rename_mod_details_placeholder: Add any notes or details hereâ€¦
rename_mod_type_hint: Applies to every mod with type {0} in the list.
rename_mod_type_hint_mods_tab: Applies to every mod with type {0} in the Mods tab.
rename_mod_type_hint_configs_tab: Applies to every config with type {0} in the Configs tab.
no_mods_hint: Drag and drop mods here or use the "Add Mod" button to get started.
delete_preset_confirm: Delete preset "{0}"? Mods will remain in your list.
tweak_godrays_desc: Volumetric lighting from the sun. Turn off for a small FPS boost.
tweak_grass_desc: Ground grass and foliage. Turn off to improve visibility and performance in forest areas.
tweak_shadows_desc: Adjust the distance and resolution of shadows.
tweak_fastload_desc: Reduces fade-in times, skips intro splash, and loads into worlds faster.
tweak_fastload_warning: May freeze on startup. If that happens, close the game completely and launch again.
mod_update_available: Newer version of your installed Nexus file
mod_nexus_link_unverified: Nexus link not verified â€” add file ID in Edit
rename_mod_nexus_file_id_hint: From the mod's Files tab on Nexus (file_id). Required for accurate update checks.
mod_update_remove_confirm: Remove the previous version of "{0}"? The new update is already installed.
mod_update_remove_cancelled: Kept the previous version of {0}. Both versions remain in your mod list.
mod_update_unavailable: This mod is not linked to Nexus or no update file is available.
mod_update_replaced: Mod update installed. Removed previous version of {0}.
mod_nexus_link_saved: Nexus link saved for this mod.
rename_mod_nexus_hint: Link this mod to its Nexus page so the manager can check for updates.
tweak_vsync_desc: Synchronizes frame rate with your monitor refresh rate to reduce screen tearing.
tweak_vsync_warning: When turning VSync off, set your FPS cap below via Frame Rate Cap, and match it in your GPU driver (NVIDIA Control Panel / AMD Adrenalin).
tweak_ao_desc: Adds contact shadows where surfaces meet. Turn off for a performance gain at the cost of depth detail.
tweak_blood_desc: Blood splatter decals on surfaces. Turn off for a small performance boost and clearer visuals.
tweak_fpscap_desc: 60 enables VSync. Higher values disable VSync and auto-apply on NVIDIA GPUs. AMD users: set the same limit in AMD Adrenalin.
tweak_fov_desc: Fallout76Custom.ini [Display] fDefaultWorldFOV â€” third-person / world camera (default in-game often 70).
tweak_motionblur_desc: Enable or disable background blur, radial blur, lens flare, and bokeh effects.
tweak_dof_desc: Blurs distant objects for a cinematic look. Turn off to keep the image sharp and improve clarity.
tweak_lensflare_desc: Lens flares from bright light sources. Turn off to remove the effect.
tweak_extrablur_desc: Radial blur and bokeh-style post effects. Turn off for a crisper image.
tweak_vatsblur_desc: Enable or disable background blur while VATS targeting is active.
tweak_taa_desc: Choose between TAA, FXAA, or None.
tweak_aniso_desc: Improves clarity of textures viewed at an angle.
tweak_water_desc: Adjust reflections and displacement of water surfaces.
tweak_lod_desc: Controls how far away items and characters appear before popping in.
tweak_decals_desc: Controls the number of bullet holes, scorch marks, and blood splatters.
tweak_pipboyfx_desc: Scanlines and screen curve on the Pip-Boy display. Turn off for a flat, crisp screen.
tweak_pipboyfx_warning: Turning the CRT effect off may make your Pip-Boy difficult or impossible to see and use. Turn this setting back on if that happens.
tweak_ping_desc: Attempts to reduce latency and jitter.
tweak_bandwidth_desc: Allow the game to use more available bandwidth.
tweak_volumquality_desc: Controls volumetric lighting quality separate from the godrays toggle.
tweak_shadowres_desc: Lower resolutions improve GPU performance at the cost of shadow sharpness.
tweak_focusshadows_desc: Dynamic focus shadows on nearby objects. Turn off for better performance.
tweak_rendergrass_desc: Renders grass in the world. Turn off for a large FPS boost in wooded areas â€” the world will look barren.
tweak_rendergrass_warning: Turning grass rendering off makes forests and fields look empty. Re-enable if you dislike the look.
tweak_grassfade_desc: How far from the camera grass remains visible before fading out.
tweak_treedist_desc: How far trees and terrain blocks load. Also scales related terrain distances.
tweak_texturequality_desc: Global texture quality level. Low may reduce VRAM usage.
tweak_ssr_desc: Reflections on water and shiny surfaces. Disable for a noticeable FPS gain.
tweak_rainocclusion_desc: Wet-surface rain occlusion maps. Disable to save GPU time in weather.
tweak_npcshadowlights_desc: Allow NPCs to cast shadows from their lights.
tweak_decalsperframe_desc: Limits how many decals the game draws each frame.
tweak_gridload_desc: How many world cells load around you. Lower values can greatly improve FPS.
tweak_gridload_warning: Too few cells may cause pop-in or instability. Increase if the world loads incorrectly.
tweak_cellloads_desc: Allow the game to load cells in the background while playing.
tweak_gamma_desc: Display gamma brightness. Adjust to taste on your monitor.
tweak_gamma_warning: Looks different on every monitor â€” verify in-game.
tweak_pbrshadows_desc: Allows PBR shadows on effect shaders.
tweak_lodsky_desc: Sky cell LOD fade multiplier (higher = farther sky detail).
tweak_leafanim_desc: Distance at which foliage animation dampens.
tweak_corpsehighlight_desc: How strongly dead enemies are highlighted.
tweak_playernames_desc: Display other players' names in the world.
tweak_conversationhistory_desc: How much dialogue history is kept on screen.
pip_boy_desc: Customize your Pip-Boy and Flashlight color.
interface_sync_desc: Apply the same color to Pip-Boy, Quick-Boy, and Power Armor.
interface_not_set: Not yet configured in your INI. Set a color and click Apply to add it.
pa_desc: Customize your Pip-Boy color while in Power Armor.
profiles_desc: Create snapshots of your mods and settings for easy switching.
profiles_tip: Each profile saves its own unique set of enabled mods, load order, and game settings. Switching profiles automatically applies these changes.
delete_profile_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete profile "{0}"?
game_exe_not_found: Game executable not found. Please check your path in Settings.
config_test_success_with_warnings: Game install looks valid, but some optional paths or tools need attention. See the activity log for details.
config_test_game_path_empty: Game path is not set. Choose your Fallout 76 folder in Settings.
config_test_data_missing: Game Data folder not found under: {0}
import_no_new_files: Import finished. No new mod files were added.
nexus_download_premium: Direct Nexus downloads require Premium. Opening the mod page â€” use Slow Download or Mod Manager Download.
nexus_download_free_user: Free Nexus account: opening Mod Manager Download in your browser. Confirm once â€” Fallout 76 Manager will import automatically.
nexus_download_forbidden: Nexus blocked the download request. Try reconnecting your Nexus account in Settings, or download from the opened mod page.
transfer_mods_confirm: Copy your mods from {0} to {1}? Existing files on {1} will be overwritten. Your Nexus links and load order are shared, so they are kept automatically.
transfer_configs_confirm: Copy your configs from {0} to {1}? Existing files on {1} will be overwritten. Your Nexus links and load order are shared, so they are kept automatically.
transfer_mods_done: Copied {0} mod file(s) from {1} to {2}. Your Nexus links and load order are shared, so they carried over automatically.
transfer_mods_no_source: No {0} mod folder found to copy from. Set the {0} game path in Settings (or import some mods there) first.
transfer_mods_no_path: The {0} install path isn't set. Configure it in Settings, then try again.
transfer_mods_denied: Couldn't write to the {0} folder (access denied). Xbox/Game Pass installs are protected â€” run Fallout 76 Manager as administrator, or use Virtual Mod Mode.
transfer_mods_game_running: Close Fallout 76 before transferring mods â€” its files are locked while the game is running.
transfer_mods_locked: A mod file is in use, so the transfer was cancelled. Close Fallout 76 (and any tools using your mods), then try again.
mod_file_missing_platform: This mod's file isn't on the current platform yet â€” transfer or re-import it first.
nexus_collection_desc: Paste a collection URL to download all mods via the Nexus API.
nexus_collection_complete_partial: Collection "{0}" finished with {1} queued and {2} skipped/failed.
nexus_collection_login_required: Sign in with Nexus Mods in Settings before importing a collection.
nexus_collection_invalid_link: Unsupported collection link. Sign in with Nexus Mods in Settings and try again, or paste the collection URL.
nexus_collection_missing_input: Provide a collection URL or slug.
nexus_collection_in_progress: A collection import is already in progress.
nexus_collection_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch collection from Nexus.
nexus_collection_mod_skipped: Skipped a collection mod (file {0}) â€” could not resolve mod info.
profile_exists: Profile with this name already exists.
no_ini_found: No INI files found to back up.
no_mod_files_found: No mod files found to back up.
import_no_valid_files: Import failed: No valid mod files found (or all were duplicates).
health_no_conflicts: No conflicts detected in your current load order.
health_deploy_stale_hint: INI archive list does not match enabled mods in load order. Deploy all enabled mods from the Mods tab.
backups_panel_desc: Preview and restore timestamped INI, mod, and config backups.
backups_empty: No backups found yet. Create one using the buttons above.
backup_restore_confirm: Restore this backup? A pre-restore snapshot will be created first.
backup_restore_mods_confirm: Restore this mod backup? Your current mod files and mod list metadata may be overwritten. A pre-restore snapshot will be created first.
backup_restore_success_snapshot: Backup restored. Pre-restore snapshot saved as {0}.
no_mods_backups_found: No mod backups found. Use Backup Mods first.
backups_no_matches: No backups match your search or filter.
backup_detail_empty: Select a backup to preview its contents. Click the same row again to close.
delete_backup_confirm: Delete this backup permanently? This cannot be undone.
delete_all_backups_confirm: Permanently delete all {0} backup(s)? This cannot be undone.
delete_all_backups_partial: Deleted {0} backup(s). {1} could not be removed.
action_unavailable: This action is not available right now. Try restarting the app.
bulk_update_mods_hint: Download and install all available Nexus mod updates
bulk_update_confirm: Update {0} mod(s) now? Old versions will be replaced.
bulk_update_check_confirm: Check Nexus for updates and install all available updates?
collection_update_apply_confirm: Import the latest collection revision from Nexus?
collection_update_available: A newer collection revision is available on Nexus.
shortcuts_settings_desc: Shortcuts work globally while the manager window is focused.
no_bundles_desc: Combine multiple mods into a single optimized BA2 archive to improve game stability and bypass the mod limit.
file_entry_drop_hint: Use the Actions (â‹¯) menu to add archives, mods, or folders. You can also drag .ba2 files here.
file_entry_expand_ba2: Click a staged archive above to inspect and choose files.
file_entry_expand_folder: Click a staged folder above to view its contents.
file_entry_folders_only: File selection applies to staged BA2 archives. Folders pack as-is.
inspector_load_timeout: Timed out loading archive contents. The archive may be too large or unavailable.
workspace_empty_hint: Use the menu to add mods, BA2 files, or folders.
bundle_nothing_to_pack: Nothing selected to pack. Add sources via the menu or select files in a staged archive.
bundle_nothing_to_extract: Nothing selected to extract. Check files in the archive tree or use Select all.
rename_bundle_prompt: Enter new name for this bundle:
delete_bundle_confirm: Permanently delete "{0}"? This cannot be undone.
move_bundle_to_mods_confirm: Move "{0}" into your mod list? It will be removed from Bundles and appear on the Mods tab.
bundle_move_to_mods_failed: Could not move bundle to Mods: {0}
ensure_internal_mods: Add BA2 mods to your list first, or use Add External BA2.
no_log_entries: No log entries found for this category.
conflict_desc: The following mods are attempting to overwrite the same game files.
conflict_auto_override_desc: Skip this warning in the future and always force deploy.
archive_key_desc: Controls which INI key the manager uses for the mod load list. Use sResourceIndexFileList if your game language requires it (e.g. Spanish voice-over in newer areas).
tweak_fov1st_desc: Fallout76Custom.ini [Display] fDefault1stPersonFOV â€” first-person view (default in-game often 70).
tweak_fov_pipboy_desc: Fallout76Custom.ini [Display] fPipboy1stFOV â€” Pip-Boy screen; Creation Engine setting (may be ignored in some builds).
nexus_sso_pending: Nexus Mods sign-in will be available after this application is registered with Nexus Mods.
nexus_sso_pending_desc: In-app Nexus search and downloads require application registration with Nexus Mods. Use Mod Manager Download on the Nexus website â€” Fallout 76 Manager will import mods via NXM links.
nexus_login_sso_hint: Opens your browser to authorize this application with your Nexus account.
